idea.title: Stellar Hearts
idea.hook: Read his mood, play the right card, and win his heart among the stars.
idea.hook_ru: Чувствуй его настроение, разыгрывай нужную карту и покори его сердце среди звёзд.
idea.why_novel: Gives a pure otome a real arcade catch: a card-match date where you read the suitor's mood and play the matching response card to score chemistry, wrapped around an affinity plus memory-card-gacha meta.

ten_min_loop: Each date is a short sequence of moments. The suitor shows a mood; play a response card from your hand whose tags match it to score chemistry; chain matches for a combo multiplier; fill the bond bar to win the date and unlock a memory. A memory-card gacha collects more cards; per-suitor bond levels gate new dates and suitors; a daily call grants a free pull. Tasteful and fully clothed, earned and rewarded-ad currency only.

sources.title: Gacha + otome pivot (2026-06-05)
sources.snippet: The standalone otome of the three (realizes the Love-in-Deep-Space idea), scoped to a buildable card-match verb instead of a branching visual novel.
